tools.name: dns_lookup
tools.description: Resolve DNS records (A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS, CNAME, SOA) for a domain using Cloudflare DoH.

tools.name: security_headers
tools.description: Check HTTP security headers (HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options, etc.) and return a 0–100 score.

tools.name: phishing_check
tools.description: Heuristic phishing/suspicious-domain signal analysis. Returns risk level (low/medium/high) and signal list.

tools.name: full_report
tools.description: Full domain intelligence report: DNS, HTTP headers, phishing signals, registrar hint, email security (SPF/DMARC).
